title: App crashes during trading
body: The app keeps crashing when I try to execute an options trade. Lost money because the sell button was completely unresponsive during a volatile spike.

title: Terrible customer support
body: Customer support is practically non-existent. I raised a ticket about a failed UPI deposit 4 days ago and only get automated replies from the bot.

title: KYC stuck forever
body: I submitted my PAN and Aadhar last week. It still says verification in progress. My friends got verified on other apps in 10 minutes. Pathetic onboarding.

title: Good but slow UI
body: Love the clean UI for mutual funds, but the recent update made the portfolio refresh rate extremely slow. Please fix the lag.

title: Best broker
body: Smooth account opening process and great charts. Never had an issue with withdrawals.

title: Hidden charges
body: They promised zero brokerage but there are so many hidden DP charges when you sell delivery stocks.

title: Money deducted but not showing
body: My bank shows the money was deducted for the SIP but the app says payment failed. I cannot reach any human to resolve this.

title: Nice for beginners
body: Very easy to understand mutual funds here. Only deducting one star because the dark mode is not available.

title: Chart glitches
body: Candlestick charts do not load properly on 1-minute timeframes. Switching back to Zerodha.

title: GTT order failed
body: My GTT order did not trigger even though the price was hit. This caused a huge loss.
